issues.detail: Skill is vendor-locked to NVIDIA NemoClaw, not cross-platform.
Installer uses curl | bash from nvidia.com without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Install NemoClaw and bootstrap code-agent sandbox on Ubuntu
scenarios.rationale: Baseline has no knowledge of NemoClaw and either refuses or invents commands; treatment correctly verifies Ubuntu 22.04+/Node 20+/Docker prerequisites, uses the curl | bash installer from nvidia.com, runs nemoclaw code-agent connect, then openclaw tui inside the sandbox, mentioning the NVIDIA API key.

scenarios.name: Deploy research-agent sandbox to remote GPU via Brev
scenarios.rationale: Baseline has no awareness of the nemoclaw deploy command or Brev integration; treatment uses nemoclaw research-agent status to verify local health, nemoclaw deploy research-agent to provision the remote GPU, and nemoclaw research-agent logs --follow to monitor, noting the same security policies apply remotely.
